fallbackPolicy.description: Apply general income and capital gains treatment where crypto-specific detail is absent.

eventRules.notes: Staking rewards treated as income at receipt for MVP assumptions.
Principal unstaking is modeled as a non-taxable return for MVP unless accompanied by explicit reward proceeds.
LP deposit is modeled as a non-taxable position entry in the MVP.
LP withdrawal is modeled as a disposal event for MVP gain/loss estimation.
